context: Evaluates the affordabot impact quantification Pydantic schema models. Checks ImpactMode enum values, ScenarioBounds ordering validation, LegislationAnalysisResponse structure, and correct qualitative-only handling.

checklist.name: ImpactMode enum values
checklist.description: ImpactMode enum has all five values: DIRECT_FISCAL, COMPLIANCE_COST, PASS_THROUGH_INCIDENCE, ADOPTION_TAKE_UP, QUALITATIVE_ONLY with correct string values.

checklist.name: ScenarioBounds ordering enforced
checklist.description: ScenarioBounds raises ValidationError when p10 > p50 or p50 > p90, ensuring probabilistic ordering is valid.

checklist.name: Valid impact accepted
checklist.description: LegislationImpact with mode=DIRECT_FISCAL and valid ScenarioBounds validates without errors.

checklist.name: Qualitative impact with None bounds
checklist.description: LegislationImpact with mode=QUALITATIVE_ONLY and bounds=None (or all-None ScenarioBounds) is accepted as valid.

checklist.name: LegislationAnalysisResponse structure
checklist.description: LegislationAnalysisResponse accepts bill_number, jurisdiction, a list of LegislationImpact, and sufficiency_state fields.
